title: A4 High Tech threshold and commodity coverage
primary_observations: Economy shares, commodity list, missing construction materials, supporting links
success_condition: Detect whether High Tech promotion materially improves whole-colony material coverage

title: Post-build station-class market differences
required_state: Comparable colony-type builds on comparable bodies
primary_observations: Services, commodities, missions, visible economy behavior, market links
success_condition: Detect any repeatable post-build difference not visible in preview

title: Refinery threshold for metals at the Dodec
primary_target: Weak Refinery support on the Dodec
required_state: Stable Dodec baseline with absent Steel Titanium Aluminium
primary_observations: Market links, economy shares, commodity list after each incremental change
success_condition: Identify minimum intervention that restores the missing metals

title: Local body modifier non-stacking
required_state: Bodies chosen to isolate rings organics and geological traits
primary_observations: Preview economy shares and final observed economy behavior
success_condition: Determine whether modifiers stack, override, or remain single-application

title: Main Port routing and link aggregation
primary_target: Main surface and orbital port routing
required_state: Body with both main surface and main orbital ports plus supporting facilities
primary_observations: Visible Market Links, main-port assignment, commodity changes after isolated edits
success_condition: Determine whether visible arrows aggregate upstream contributions through a main-port path

title: Strong-link modifier exact values and additive stacking
required_state: Body and system combinations that isolate single and stacked link modifiers
primary_observations: Visible Market Links, economy percentages, link deltas under controlled body conditions
success_condition: Determine whether strong-link modifiers are additive ±0.4 changes with a 0.1 floor

title: Same-strength economy tie ordering
required_state: Port states where at least two economies are held at equal strength
primary_observations: Displayed order, interior selection, market summary after controlled equalization
success_condition: Determine whether equal-strength economies are ranked alphabetically in live builds

title: Body-specific population multipliers
required_state: New builds on body classes that still have TBD population multipliers
primary_observations: Weekly population, output snapshots, body class, facility class
success_condition: Fill the missing body-specific multiplier rows with directly observed values

title: Demolition and population decay
required_state: Facility with stable recorded population before demolition
primary_observations: Population before demolition, population after demolition, downstream output effects
success_condition: Determine whether demolition actually removes the associated population

title: Settlement pad-size divergence by variant
required_state: Settlement variants suspected of pad metadata mismatch
primary_observations: Advertised pad size, actual docking access by ship size, variant name
success_condition: Map which settlement variants misreport pad availability
